vision_mission: A production-grade AI-powered real estate chatbot and CRM designed to autonomously engage, qualify, and score leads for the KW Srishti sales team 24/7.
tech_structure:
**Backend**: Node.js, Express.js
**Database**: SQLite (`better-sqlite3`) with Railway persistent volume
**AI Engines**: Hugging Face Open-Source Models (Llama 3 / Qwen) with OpenRouter fallback
**Communications**: Web Chat Widget (Vanilla JS), WhatsApp (Twilio Webhooks), Telegram Bot API
**Media Management**: Cloudinary for real-time image optimization
**Deployment**: Railway PaaS with auto-deploy from GitHub
documentation: The platform serves as an all-in-one lead engine. Key features include: automated intent-based lead scoring (0-100), real-time omnichannel chat logging (Web, WhatsApp, Telegram), automated Cloudinary floor plan push, UTM campaign tracking, and a secure real-time Admin CRM dashboard with CSV exports.
kpis:
- Active Chat Sessions / Daily Engagements
- Lead Qualification Rate (Leads scoring > 70)
- Data Extraction Accuracy (Phone, Budget, Timeline)
- Cost per qualified lead (AI inferencing vs. traditional)
- Channel Volume Ratio (WhatsApp vs. Web)
marketing_material: Capture High-Intent Real Estate Buyers 24/7. Never miss a lead again with a hyper-intelligent conversational agent that speaks your buyers' language, sends floorplans instantly, and scores them automatically for your sales team.
pitch_deck: For real estate teams buried in dead-end inquiries, the KW Srishti LeadBot is an omnichannel AI assistant that lives on your Website, WhatsApp, and Telegram. It autonomously qualifies leads by budget, timeline, and intent while delivering an unparalleled 24/7 concierge experience, feeding your sales team only the hottest prospects.
todo_list:
- [ ] Transition from Twilio Sandbox to an Official WhatsApp Business API Sender
- [ ] Implement interactive WhatsApp message templates (Buttons/Lists)
- [ ] Expand multilingual responses for better localized lead capturing
- [ ] Add direct CRM API sync (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot)
- [ ] Develop Advanced Analytics UI for traffic sources in the Admin Dashboard
roadmap_future_dev:
**Phase 1 (Growth)**: Official WhatsApp Business API launch & Multi-project support.
**Phase 2 (Handoff)**: Live un-interrupted agent handoff in exactly the same chat window.
**Phase 3 (Voice)**: AI Voice Agents for automated initial follow-up calls to hot leads.
